## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)

## Checklist

<!-- Confirm these are true: -->
- [ ] `make verify` passes (`scan` + `lint` + `build` + `test`)
- [ ] New tools/schemas/client methods have unit tests
- [ ] New tools are listed in `README.md` / `README.zh-CN.md` tool tables
- [ ] Conventional Commits style used for the PR title and each commit
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens included
